slots: Maratha history, grand fortification, cultural legacy

Step into the former seat of the Peshwas and explore the remains of one of Maharashtra's most significant historical landmarks. Discover stories of power, politics, and the rise of the Maratha Empire.
Traditional artifacts, folk art, heritage collections
Journey through centuries of Indian craftsmanship as you explore an extraordinary collection of sculptures, musical instruments, and everyday treasures from across the country.
Local cuisine, shopping, vibrant city life
Experience Pune's youthful energy with a leisurely walk through its bustling streets, lined with popular eateries, cafés, and local shopping spots.
Freedom movement, colonial architecture, national heritage
Visit one of India's most important historical monuments, closely associated with Mahatma Gandhi and the country's struggle for independence.
Pataleshwar Cave Temple & Pune Heritage Walk
Rock-cut temple, ancient architecture, city heritage
Explore an 8th-century cave temple hidden within the city before discovering Pune's historic neighbourhoods and cultural landmarks.
Unwind amidst lush greenery and enjoy a peaceful evening at one of Pune's most beloved public spaces.
Venture to the legendary fort associated with Tanaji Malusare and witness breathtaking views of the Sahyadri ranges from its historic ramparts.
Scenic landscapes, waterfront views, nature escape
Enjoy a refreshing break surrounded by tranquil waters and rolling hills, making it a favourite getaway for locals and visitors alike.
End your Pune experience by sampling the city's iconic culinary delights and discovering why it is considered one of Maharashtra's most exciting food destinations.
